evals.prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. The repo is at /Users/josh/.claude/skills/commit-workspace/test-repos/multi-domain-changes. I made several changes in this session: added auth middleware, updated the API handler, added auth config fields, fixed a logging bug (was using local time instead of UTC), and updated the README.
evals.expected_output: Multiple logical commits: auth feature grouped together, logging fix separate, docs possibly separate. Commit messages should describe the WHY/WHAT clearly. Should NOT be one giant commit.

evals.prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. The repo is at /Users/josh/.claude/skills/commit-workspace/test-repos/thoughts-exclusion. I refactored HandleRequest to accept a method parameter and updated the tests.

evals.prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. The repo is at /Users/josh/.claude/skills/commit-workspace/test-repos/single-logical-change. I renamed GetUser to FetchUser and GetUsers to FetchUsers across the codebase.
